briefdescription.para: Layer index for the first SceneChange stream.
Maximum number of test patterns to cycle through.
Callback function for scene change detection.

detaileddescription.para: This function is called when a scene change is detected by the IP. It prints the layer ID and SAD (Sum of Absolute Differences) value, and sets the detection flag.

simplesect.para: This callback is registered with XV_scenechange_SetCallback().

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the SceneChange IP, configures all enabled streams with their parameters (height, width, stride, color format, histogram bits, threshold), sets up interrupts, registers the callback, and starts the IP in auto-restart mode.

XST_SUCCESS if initialization succeeds XST_FAILURE if any initialization step fails
This function expects memory-based mode. It will fail for stream mode. This function initializes the SceneChange IP for stream mode operation, configures the enabled stream with its parameters (height, width, stride, color format, histogram bits, threshold), sets up interrupts, registers the callback, and starts the IP in auto-restart mode.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization succeeds XST_FAILURE if any initialization step fails
This function expects stream-based mode. It will fail for memory mode.

detaileddescription.para: This function performs a hardware reset of the video processing pipeline. For GPIO-based systems, it toggles the GPIO reset signal. For other systems, it uses register writes to perform the reset sequence.

None
The reset sequence includes setting reset, clearing it, and setting it again to ensure proper IP initialization. This function performs a hardware reset of the video processing pipeline by writing to the appropriate registers. The reset sequence ensures proper initialization of all IPs in the pipeline.

simplesect.para: The reset sequence includes setting reset, clearing it, and setting it again to ensure proper IP initialization.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears the terminal screen and resets the cursor to the home position (0,0) using ANSI escape sequences.

simplesect.para: Uses ANSI escape sequences which may not work on all terminals.

briefdescription.para: Main function for SceneChange memory mode test application.

detaileddescription.para: This application configures the SceneChange IP in memory mode to calculate SAD values between consecutive frames. It initializes the platform, configures the IP with test patterns, and monitors for scene change detections. The test cycles through different memory patterns to trigger scene changes.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if scene change is detected and test passes XST_FAILURE if initialization fails or no scene change detected
The test expects at least one scene change detection within MAX_PATTERNS iterations.
